signals.raw:
OKC Thunder Clinch No. 1 Seed with Home-Court Advantage Throughout Playoffs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Oklahoma City Thunder have secured the NBA's top overall seed and best regular-season record (64-17), locking in home-court advantage for the entire postseason ahead of their final regular-season game against the Phoenix Suns on Sunday night.[1][2][4]

signals.raw:
